meaning: n.目录,名单,列表,序列,数据清单,明细表,条纹,[总称]各种上市证券vt.列出,列于表上,记入名单内,装布条vi.列于表上
examples: I am already on your mailing list.
Princess Anne topped the guest list.
Using the Forbes Total Production Number, we list the best 50 hitters in the major leagues.
Our list consists of no-load diversified U.S. equity funds with the best records since March 2000.
